---
title: "Resume"
---

### Education

**Master of Geomatics for Environmental Management**\
**University of British Columbia, Vancouver, BC** \| 2025 – Present

-   Focused on remote sensing, spatial analysis, and environmental management\
-   Gaining expertise in GIS, imaging spectroscopy, and environmental modeling\
-   Applied coursework and projects emphasize practical environmental data analysis and decision support

**Bachelor of Science in Environmental Sciences** – *Environmental Science with Co-op*\
**University of Guelph, Guelph, ON** \| September 2020 – 2025

-   Completed 22 credits, including:
    -   *Waterborne Disease Ecology*: Epidemiology and ecology of pathogens in aquatic systems\
    -   *Toxicological Risk Assessment*: Effects of environmental contaminants on ecosystems and human health\
-   Gained practical environmental lab experience
-   Hands-on field research including soil and water sampling, site analysis, technical reporting\
-   Collaborated on environmental interpretation projects and explored advanced topics such as environmental remediation strategies and pesticide risk assessment

### Work Experience

**Field Technician** – *XS Soil Solutions Inc., Oakville, ON*\
*May 2023 – August 2025 \| Full-time (40 hrs/week)*

-   Conducted site visits to evaluate excess soil conditions and compliance with environmental regulations\
-   Collected, processed, and analyzed soil samples; prepared technical reports\
-   Coordinated with clients, contractors, and regulatory agencies\
-   Gained hands-on experience with soil remediation techniques and environmental legislation

**Research Assistant** – *University of Guelph, Guelph, ON*\
*September 2022 – December 2022 \| Full-time (40 hrs/week)*

-   Researched cyanobacteria in small urban lakes; ensured high-quality data collection\
-   Assisted in field sampling and data measurement; prepared detailed reports\
-   Organized research data in various software programs

**Environmental Intern** – *Morguard Investments, Mississauga, ON*\
*January 2022 – April 2022 \| Full-time (40 hrs/week)*

-   Supported environmental management system and electronic filing system\
-   Assisted with report review, data entry, and finalization of environmental reports\
-   Ensured data integrity and supported departmental projects as required

### Technical Skills

**Remote Sensing & GIS:**

-   ArcGIS Pro, QGIS, and spatial data analysis\
-   Imaging spectroscopy and hyperspectral analysis\
-   LiDAR data processing and 3D terrain modeling\
-   Satellite imagery interpretation
-   Land cover classification, change detection, and mapping

**Environmental & Laboratory Skills:**

-   PCR, DNA extraction, differential media testing\
-   Soil and water sampling, site assessment, and field surveys\
-   Environmental monitoring and technical reporting

**Data & Programming:**

-   R and Python for environmental data analysis and visualization\
-   Microsoft Excel, Word, and PowerPoint\
-   Database management and data cleaning

## Soft Skills

-   **Communication:** Clearly convey technical and complex information in both professional and client-facing settings; adept at explaining procedures, findings, and recommendations\
-   **Teamwork & Collaboration:** Work effectively with research teams, lab colleagues, and service staff to achieve goals and ensure smooth operations\
-   **Customer Service & Client Relations:** Built strong relationships with clients and customers, resolving concerns professionally and ensuring positive experiences\
-   **Organization & Time Management:** Successfully manage multiple tasks, projects, and responsibilities in fieldwork, laboratory settings, and fast-paced service environments\
-   **Problem Solving & Adaptability:** Quickly identify solutions in dynamic situations, whether in research projects, environmental fieldwork, or high-pressure customer service\
-   **Leadership & Mentoring:** Guided junior team members, trained new staff, and supported colleagues in both academic and professional settings

------------------------------------------------------------------------
